title: Korak 34

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: Treba da odštampate '{name}' promoted to '{new_level}'. gde {name} i {new_level} treba zameniti sa imenom zaposlenog i novim nivoom, respektivno.
tests.testString:
({ test: () => runPython(`
    import io
    import sys
        
    captured_output = io.StringIO()
    sys.stdout = captured_output
        
    empl = Employee("Frank", "trainee")
    empl.level = 'junior'
        
    sys.stdout = sys.__stdout__
    output = captured_output.getvalue()
        
    assert "'Frank' promoted to 'junior'." in output
`) })

description: Dovršite setter štampanjem '{name}' promoted to '{new_level}'. u vašoj metodi. Zamenite {name} i {new_level} sa imenom zaposlenog i novim nivoom, po odelima.
